name: @workflow-agent/local-agent
description: Electron desktop agent — receives commands from cloud, executes on user's machine

scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=@workflow-agent/shared && tsc && npm run copy-assets
scripts.test-server: npm run build --workspace=@workflow-agent/shared && tsc && node dist/test/test-server.js
scripts.dist: npm run generate-config && npm run build && electron-builder --mac

extendInfo.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: WFA Agent records your voice instructions during workflow automation.
extendInfo.NSScreenCaptureDescription: WFA Agent captures screen content to record and replay workflows.
extendInfo.NSAppleEventsUsageDescription: WFA Agent uses Apple Events to automate applications.
